arts.ttl: Raphinha hits hat-trick as Barcelona demolish Bayern
arts.sum: Barcelona winger Raphinha scores a superb hat-trick as his side thrash Bayern Munich in the Champions League league phase.

arts.ttl: How Barcelona's 'exceptional' midfield trio made the difference against Bayern Munich
arts.sum: Watch Match of the Day analysis of how Barcelona's trio of 21-year-old midfielders - Marc Casadó, Pedri and Fermín López - inspired the five-time winners to a fantastic 4-1 victory over Bayern Munich.

arts.ttl: Match Awards from Bayern Munich’s 4-1 Champions League drubbing at the hands of FC Barcelona
arts.sum: Operating on the left wing in this Battle of the Impossibly High Lines, Raphinha routinely found space in behind, around, and through Bayern’s Raphaël Guerreiro. Upamecano in particular was cleaning up on the right flank after Barça’s wingers beat make-shift right-back Guerreiro again and again and again — sometimes getting back in time to make the intervention, and sometimes, as on the third goal, just barely not.

arts.ttl: Bavarian Podcast Works — Postgame Show: FC Barcelona 4-1 Bayern Munich (Champions League)
arts.sum: Hansi Flick had his team aggressive, creative, and relentless (shades of his tenure at Bayern Munich) and maybe most importantly, Flick had his squad prepared to take advantage of Bayern Munich’s iffy backline — and that is exactly what the Catalans did to snare a 4-1 victory. Be sure to stay tuned to Bavarian Podcast Works for all of your up to date coverage on Bayern Munich and Germany.

arts.ttl: Ten observations from Bayern Munich’s crushing 4-1 loss to FC Barcelona
arts.sum: If there’s anything good to come out of this game, it’s the fact that the majority of terminally online Bayern fans, who probably started watching the team AFTER the 2020 treble, get to see that, yes, Hansi Flick is actually an elite coach who can bring the best out of his players. Early in the game (around the first 20 minutes or so) Bayern legitimately looked like the better team.

arts.ttl: Bayern lost confidence against Barcelona, Müller admits
arts.sum: Thomas Müller felt Barcelona took the confidence away from Bayern Munich in Wednesday's Champions League clash.

arts.ttl: Vincent Kompany: "No excuses" after Bayern's clear loss to Barcelona
arts.sum: Bayern Munich coach Vincent Kompany has taken responsibility for his team's 4-1 defeat to Barcelona and says he's confident they will learn from the loss.

arts.ttl: Harry Kane and Bayern Munich humbled by Barcelona as ex-Leeds star Raphinha hits hat-trick
arts.sum: BARCELONA 4-1 BAYERN MUNICH: Harry Kane's equaliser only proved to be a consolation as Raphinha bagged a hat-trick and Robert Lewandowski got the scoresheet in this Champions League thriller

arts.ttl: Erling Haaland inspires Man City as Liverpool and Barcelona pick up big wins
arts.sum: Lille came from a goal down to secure a 3-1 win at Atletico Madrid.

arts.ttl: Barcelona legend responds to 4-1 drubbing of Bayern Munich
arts.sum: Former Barcelona star Gerard Piqué has late tonight taken to social media, to reveal his delight with the latest showing put forth by the Blaugrana. Hansi Flick’s troops are of…
